prompt.instruction: Bounded public demo lookup: inspect RFC Editor pages for April Fools RFCs only. Report official titles and one-sentence summaries. Pick the funniest official-looking standard from the allowlisted set.
prompt.context:
Allowlisted sources only:
- https://www.rfc-editor.org/info/rfc2324
- https://www.rfc-editor.org/info/rfc1149
- https://www.rfc-editor.org/info/rfc2549

Forbidden: social media, login, forms, downloads, purchases, arbitrary domains, repo file mutation.

Deterministic candidates:
- RFC 2324 — Hyper Text Coffee Pot Control Protocol (418 I'm a teapot)
- RFC 1149 — IP Datagrams on Avian Carriers
- RFC 2549 — IP over Avian Carriers with QoS

Output JSON: { "winner_rfc": "2324|1149|2549", "title": "...", "one_line": "...", "source_urls": ["..."], "boundary": "cited RFC Editor pages only" }
